name: codex-game-studios
description: Codex-compatible packaging of the CodeX Game Studios slash-command workflow.

interface.shortDescription: Game studio workflows for Codex with Claude-compatible slash commands
interface.longDescription: Adds the CodeX Game Studios command set to Codex while preserving the original Claude command names and workflow structure.
defaultPrompt: Run /start to onboard a new game project.
Use /setup-engine godot 4.6 to configure the repo.
Use /team-combat to coordinate a combat feature.
